Dear Sir/Madam, 
 
Sub: Results Earnings Call Q2 FY24 – Transcript 
 
In continuation of our letters dated October 7, 2023, October 16, 2023 and October 17, 2023 we would like 
to inform that transcript of the Results Earnings Call held on Tuesday, October 17, 2023 at 4:00 p.m. IST and 
ended at 5:01 pm IST for the Unaudited  Financial Results of the Company for the quarter and half year ended 
September 
30, 
2023 
has 
been 
made 
available 
on 
the 
Company’s 
website 
at 
https://www.ceat.com/investors/financial-performance.html 
 
You are requested to kindly take the same on record and disseminate appropriately. 
 
Thanking you, 
 
Yours faithfully, 
For CEAT Limited 
 
 
Vallari Gupte 
Company Secretary and Compliance Officer 
 
VALLARI 
KEDAR 
GUPTE
Digitally signed 
by VALLARI 
KEDAR GUPTE
